demands.title: Add advisor eval regression gate
demands.problem: Advisor quality can regress without a blocking PR signal.
demands.outcome: Prevent advisor eval regressions before pull request merge.
non_goals: Do not redesign the eval framework

requirements.statement: Pull requests must fail when the advisor eval pass rate drops below the accepted threshold.
acceptance: CI runs the advisor eval subset.
Failure output includes grouped metric summaries.

gaps.question: What pass-rate threshold should block a pull request?
gaps.resolution: Use the current baseline threshold until a stronger release gate is agreed.

tracks.title: Validation and CI
tracks.description: Add the automated regression gate and evidence path.
